summary: File-level verification only (no Supabase / no running Flutter). Validated all 11 items from the review request for the Next Chapter profile-detail rewrite + migration 008 cleanup. flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos returns 0 errors and 0 warnings (75 info-level deprecations which the user has explicitly opted to ignore). All file-level checks pass; safe for the user to (a) run migration 008 in Supabase, (b) refresh the app, (c) verify live UI personally.

verification_checklist.mock_data_service_deleted: PASS — /app/nextchapter_audit/src/lib/services/ contains only supabase_service.dart. Recursive grep for 'MockDataService' and 'mock_data_service' across lib/ returns 0 matches.
verification_checklist.flutter_analyze_clean: PASS — 0 errors, 0 warnings, 75 info (all deprecation_member_use — withOpacity / FormField value / anonKey / RadioGroup — explicitly accepted by user).
verification_checklist.profile_detail_layout: PASS — lib/screens/profile_detail_screen.dart uses Scaffold(appBar: AppBar, body: ListView). No CustomScrollView / SliverAppBar / SliverToBoxAdapter. ListView (line 165) contains photo block + thumbnails + name/age/online/completeness + location + verification badges + modes + About Me (line 274) + Their Story / prompts (line 281) + Looking For (line 307) + Interests (line 314) + Life Situation (line 321) + Details. bottomNavigationBar (line 342) shows Edit/Complete CTA when isOwn else Message/Unblock CTA.
verification_checklist.load_short_circuit: PASS — _load() at lines 48-87 reads ProfileProvider.profile and short-circuits if own.id == widget.profileId (lines 55-62) — own profile renders immediately without a network call.
verification_checklist.appbar_actions: PASS — line 133 if(isOwn) → IconButton with Icons.edit_outlined (line 136) pushing /me/edit; else (line 140) Consumer<BlockProvider> renders PopupMenuButton<String> with Report (line 147) and Block/Unblock (line 153).
verification_checklist.my_profile_routing: PASS — lib/screens/my_profile_screen.dart: !isLoggedIn → /login (line 31); profileId == null → /me/edit (line 35); profile not complete → /welcome (line 39); else returns ProfileDetailScreen(profileId: profile.profileId!) (line 43).
verification_checklist.app_shell_5tabs_my_profile: PASS — lib/screens/app_shell.dart NavigationBar has 5 destinations: Browse (explore_outlined/explore), Activity (favorite_outline/favorite), Messages (chat_bubble_outline/chat_bubble) with unread Badge, My Profile (account_circle_outlined/account_circle) at index 3, Settings (settings_outlined/settings). Note: review request named branch 3 'Inbox' / 'Me' but actual labels are 'Messages' / 'My Profile' — labels are user-facing and consistent.
verification_checklist.migration_008_present: PASS — /app/nextchapter_audit/src/supabase/migrations/008_cleanup_legacy_demos.sql exists. (a) deletes where first_name in ('Robert','Patricia') line 21; (b) excludes the 6 canonical user_ids 00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000001..6 lines 22-29; (c) deletes from public.profiles (line 33) BEFORE auth.users (line 38) — correct cascade order; (d) wrapped in do $$ ... end$$ (lines 14, 40) so re-runnable / idempotent.
verification_checklist.canonical_ids_match_007: PASS — 007_b9_demo_seed.sql lines 120, 126, 132, 138, 144, 150 insert auth.users with the exact same 6 uuids ...001..006 that 008 protects. No mismatch — cleanup will not wipe canonical demos.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor inconsistency (non-blocking): review request describes 5-tab order as 'Browse / Activity / Inbox / Me / Settings' but app_shell.dart uses 'Browse / Activity / Messages / My Profile / Settings'. Functional behavior is identical; labels are just friendlier strings. No fix needed unless product wants exact wording.

profile_detail_screen.dart is 531 lines — under the 700-line threshold but worth keeping an eye on as more sections are added. Section builders (_section, _prompt card, _interestChip, etc.) could be extracted to a widgets/profile_detail/ subfolder if it grows further.

75 deprecation infos (mostly withOpacity → withValues, FormField.value → initialValue, anonKey → publishableKey, Radio groupValue/onChanged → RadioGroup) are accumulating across the codebase. User has accepted these for now, but a single follow-up cleanup pass would be valuable before the next Flutter SDK bump removes them.

Migration 008 collects legacy_user_ids into a local array first then deletes — this is the correct two-step pattern so the auth.users delete still has the ids after profiles cascade. Good defensive SQL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This iteration was file-level + flutter analyze only — no Supabase and no running Flutter app. All 11 verification points passed. After the user runs migration 008 in Supabase, a live UI re-test would confirm: (1) Browse shows exactly 6 profiles; (2) tapping a profile card renders the full ProfileDetailScreen with photo + About Me + Their Story + Looking For + Interests + Life Situation + Details + Message CTA; (3) /me tab renders the same ProfileDetailScreen for the signed-in user with Edit icon in AppBar and Edit/Complete CTA at the bottom; (4) bottom nav has 5 destinations including My Profile (account_circle).
rca of the issue: N/A — verification-only run, no bugs reproduced/fixed in this iteration. Original bugs (8 instead of 6 profiles, blank profile detail page, no public own-profile path) are addressed by: profile_detail_screen.dart rewrite (Scaffold+ListView replacing SliverAppBar), migration 008 (deletes leftover Robert/Patricia rows by name while protecting canonical 6 by uuid), and my_profile_screen.dart routing into ProfileDetailScreen for own profile.
